top_signals.title: Bloom Energy rises 2% after partnering with European AI infrastructure upstart in $2.6 billion deal
top_signals.summary: Nebius said Wednesday that it would deploy Bloom's fuel-cell technology to generate electricity faster and more quickly at its data centers in Europe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
